texto: One of the prerogatives of American citizenship is the right to criticize public men and measures, and that means not only informed and responsible criticism but the freedom to speak foolishly and without moderation.
autor: Felix Frankfurter of the U.S. Supreme Court
explicacao: Citação de Felix Frankfurter of the U.S. Supreme Court sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “One of the prerogatives of American citizenship is the right to criticize public men and measures…” articula reflexao, political, prerogatives em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
